## Responders (3)

### [DuoUnlockUserAccount v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/responders/Duo_Security)
Unlock User Account in Duo Security via AdminAPI (The user must complete secondary authentication)

- **Author:** Sven Kutzer / Gyorgy Acs, @oscd_initiative
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `thehive:case_artifact`

### [DuoLockUserAccount v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/responders/Duo_Security)
Lock User Account in Duo Security via AdminAPI (The user will not be able to log in)

- **Author:** Sven Kutzer / Gyorgy Acs, @oscd_initiative
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `thehive:case_artifact`

### [DuoBypassUserAccount v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/responders/Duo_Security)
Put User Account into Bypass mode in Duo Security via AdminAPI (The user will not be prompted when logging in.)

- **Author:** jahamilto
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `thehive:case_artifact`
